validation_policy.invalid_score_policy: invalid checks must be score_free before they can remain active
validation_policy.unvalidated_disclosure_policy: unvalidated checks require explicit disclosure and further validation; they are not silently trusted
validation_policy.target_definition: Every active score-capable check is cross_domain_validated or validated_with_limits; permanently contextual checks are manual_review_required; no score-capable active check is unvalidated, invalid, or fixture-only.

historical_usage_snapshot.source: read-only aggregate metadata; no domains or customer content
